children.title: 腾讯 Key 申请与旅行社台账

children.children: ${currentAgency.agency_id?('当前旅行社：'+(currentAgency.agency_name||'-')+'（'+(currentAgency.agency_code||'-')+'） | 预生成账号：'+((()=>{const prefix=(currentAgency.agency_name||'')+(currentAgency.agency_code||''); const seq=(Array.isArray(requestList)?requestList.length:0)+1; return prefix?(prefix+'-'+String(seq).padStart(3,'0')):'-';})())):'当前账号未绑定旅行社'}
${(row.status||'pending')==='approved'?'已通过':((row.status||'pending')==='pending'?'待审核':((row.status||'pending')==='rejected'?'已拒绝':((row.status||'pending')==='undone'?'已撤销':(row.status||'-'))))}
旅行社本地 Key 台账
${(row.last_health_status||'')==='ok'?'健康正常':((row.last_health_status||'')==='error'?'健康异常':((row.last_health_status||'')==='not_found'?'远端无记录':'未巡检'))}

${(()=>{const o=(ocrUsageAccountMap&&ocrUsageAccountMap[row.account_name])||{}; const call=(o.call_count===0?0:(o.call_count||'-')); const success=(o.success_count===0?0:(o.success_count||0)); const fail=(o.fail_count===0?0:(o.fail_count||0)); const billed=(o.billed_count===0?0:(o.billed_count||0)); return '图片OCR：'+call+' / '+(ocrQuotaTotal||1000)+' 次  ·  成功：'+success+'  ·  失败：'+fail+'  ·  计费：'+billed;})()}

${currentAgency.agency_id?('当前旅行社：'+(currentAgency.agency_name||'-')+'（'+(currentAgency.agency_code||'-')+'） | 预生成账号：'+((()=>{const prefix=(currentAgency.agency_name||'')+(currentAgency.agency_code||''); const seq=(Array.isArray(requestList)?requestList.length:0)+1; return prefix?(prefix+'-'+String(seq).padStart(3,'0')):'-';})())):'当前账号未绑定旅行社'}

adapt.validationResult: ${(()=>{const s=String(data?.status||'').toLowerCase(); if(s==='ok'){return {status:'ok', message:'校验通过（可直接申请）'};} return {status:s||'error', message:(data?.error||data?.msg||'校验失败')};})()}

children.children: ${currentAgency.agency_id?('将添加到旅行社：'+(currentAgency.agency_name||'-')+'（'+(currentAgency.agency_code||'-')+'）'):'当前账号未绑定旅行社'}
